item.title: Oche180: Oche180 @Oche180 · 3min David Munyua on sport UNITING different tribes to create PEACE and impending meeting with the Pr
item.description:
Oche180 @Oche180 · 3min David Munyua on sport UNITING different tribes to create PEACE and impending meeting with the President
"There's a lot that's going on. We are still looking to meet him [the President], he was very interested in that.
"Right now I'm in a position to talk about darts and how Mostrar más 24

item.title: philhaigh_: Phil Haigh @philhaigh_ · 12min 'I think people think it's a boring game, it's an old man's game. It's not. It can be fun
item.description:
Phil Haigh @philhaigh_ · 12min 'I think people think it's a boring game, it's an old man's game. It's not. It can be fun.
'That's why I try and play more attacking, play fast, and try and encourage young players.'
Can Stan Moody and Liam Pullen create snooker's Luke Littler effect? De metro.co.uk 6 149

item.title: TheConnorCain: Connor Cain @TheConnorCain · 37min Stephen Bunting won the same amount of titles in 2025 than Danny Noppert has won in h
item.description:
Connor Cain @TheConnorCain · 37min Stephen Bunting won the same amount of titles in 2025 than Danny Noppert has won in his entire PDC career Cita Tom Nankivell @dartingupdates · 14h Traducido del neerlandés ¡Wessel Nijman ha ascendido al 3er lugar en los Títulos PDC más ganados por un neerlandés en la historia!
158 Michael van Gerwen 29 Raymond van Barneveld 7 Roland Scholten / Wessel Nijman 6 Danny Noppert / Dirk van Duijvenbode 5 Vincent van der Voort 2 3 348

item.title:
WeAreWST: WST @WeAreWST · 41min Zhang Anda is in CRUISE CONTROL!
The World Grand Prix finalist has smashed home FOUR CENTURIES a
item.description:
WST @WeAreWST · 41min Zhang Anda is in CRUISE CONTROL!
The World Grand Prix finalist has smashed home FOUR CENTURIES already on Judgement Day.
You can watch all the action on YouTube or Ad-Free by signing up to WST Play free of charge!
#WCQ 15 3 mil
